column5: Why
gitaigo: light airy fluffy texture — pillows, clouds, pastry; pleasantly soft
gitaigo: crisp pleasant crunch — fresh bread, lightly fried food; satisfying texture
gitaigo: perfectly smooth frictionless surface — ice, polished glass, silk
gitaigo: smooth silky free-flowing — fine sand, healthy hair, thin liquid
gitaigo: effortless fluent progress — reading aloud, speaking; no hesitation
gitaigo: gritty unpleasant grainy friction — sand in food, rough gravel
gitaigo: precise orderly exactness — everything fitting neatly; methodical tidiness
gitaigo: stiff mechanical movement — robot-like; lacks natural fluidity
gitaigo: gentle pleasant warmth — sunlight on skin, cozy heated room
gitaigo: heart pounding from emotion — excitement, anxiety, anticipation
gitaigo: quiet persistent sobbing — suppressed sadness; low continuous crying
gitaigo: tense charged state — nerves on edge; atmosphere before something breaks
gitaigo: skin-close tight fit — second-skin tightness; form-fitting garment
gitaigo: thick plush fluffiness — animal fur, cloud-like blanket; soft volume
gitaigo: messy soggy disorder — mud, overcooked food; structural collapse
gitaigo: heavy oppressive dullness — overcast sky or heavy-hearted mood
gitaigo: delicate barely-there breeze — soothing air movement; almost stillness
gitaigo: clammy uncomfortable dampness — humid skin or damp fabric after effort
gitaigo: strongly scented saturation — overwhelming smell from all directions
gitaigo: unstable wobbling shaking — loose tooth, pot boiling; lack of stability
gitaigo: too-large baggy loose fit — oversized clothes that won't stay in place
gitaigo: glittering radiant sustained shine — eyes, stars, sequins; visual sparkle
gitaigo: limp floppy softness — noodles, tired body; no structural integrity
gitaigo: glossy healthy sheen — healthy hair, polished wood, ripe fruit
gitaigo: brilliantly clean sparkling — newly polished surface, pristine shoes
gitaigo: sticky viscous adhesion — natto, wet clay; reluctant surface separation
gitaigo: unpleasantly tacky clingy — sweaty skin, spilled syrup; invasive stickiness
gitaigo: thick lush dense fullness — abundant hair, foliage, tail
gitaigo: hard rigid unyielding — frozen food, dry clay, tense muscles
gitaigo: tightly squeezed compressed state — packed box, firm embrace
